ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Team identifier for the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "team_history" TEXT /* History of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., Home win, Away win, Tie) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicator if the game went into overtime */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Referees for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made */,
  "three_point_field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goal attempts */,
  "three_point_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus score */,
  "is_home" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player's team was home */,
  "is_starter" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player was a starter */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes about the player's performance */,
  "q1_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the first quarter */,
  "q2_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the second quarter */,
  "q3_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the third quarter */,
  "q4_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the fourth quarter */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating (PER) */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage (TS%) */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game for the player */,
  "advanced_notes" TEXT /* Advanced notes including video links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_is_starter FOREIGN KEY ("is_starter") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "arena_description" TEXT /* Description of the arena */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the division is part of */,
  "division_history" TEXT /* History of the division */,
  "division_rivalries" TEXT /* Key rivalries within the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_history" TEXT /* History of the conference */,
  "conference_rivalries" TEXT /* Key rivalries within the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., Regular, Playoffs) */,
  "champions" TEXT /* Champions of the season */,
  "mvp" TEXT /* Most Valuable Player (MVP) of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
